instructions: Generate a functional React component written in TypeScript
Define component props as interface I{Name}Props with strict types — no 'any'
Use CSS Modules for all styling — import styles from './{Name}.module.css'
Export the component as default from {Name}.tsx and re-export via index.ts
Write unit tests in {Name}.test.tsx using Jest + @testing-library/react
Tests must cover: renders without crashing, prop variations, user interactions
Use userEvent from @testing-library/user-event for interaction tests
Do not use snapshot tests — prefer explicit assertions on rendered output
